description:
👉 MENTORSHIP – Applications for the March 2026 cohort are now open!
Apply here → https://theanalyticsaccelerator.com/

🎁 Get the Business Metrics Cheatsheet (top metrics for popular industries + how to integrate them into your projects)! → https://analyticsaccelerator.kit.com/bmc

ABOUT THIS VIDEO

Most aspiring data analysts make the same mistake: they report numbers without explaining what they actually mean.

In this video, I'm breaking down the Pyramid Framework - the simplest way to understand business metrics, KPIs, and OKRs so you can speak like an experienced analyst (even if you've never worked in the industry before).

You'll learn:
• Why most junior analysts sound like they're reading a spreadsheet (and how to fix it)
• The 3-layer pyramid that separates metrics, KPIs, and OKRs
• The cheat code that lets you apply business knowledge across ANY industry
• How to pick which metrics actually matter (hint: most companies use just 2 questions)
• Practical next steps to improve your understanding of business metrics

If you've ever wondered how many metrics you need to know or how to talk about them in interviews without sounding lost, this video is for you.

ABOUT ME
If we haven’t met yet - hi! I’m Christine, a former data director and hiring manager helping ambitious career transitioners and recent grads land their first job as a data analyst. I'll be sharing the insights and strategies that empowered over 70% of job-hunting students in the first cohort of my mentorship program landed their first data job within 6 months, in today's super-competitive job market.

If you want to become a standout data analyst through applied business skills, soft skills, and strategies for every part of the job hunt process - so that you can have confidence, professional leverage, and bring real impact to work - connect below for more insights and future workshops!

LINKS
- Get more tips in my newsletter - https://the-analytics-accelerator.kit.com/join
- Apply to the next cohort - https://theanalyticsaccelerator.com/
- Follow on LinkedIn - https://linkedin.com/in/christine-jiang

Timestamps:
0:00 - Introduction
0:54 - The Metrics Pyramid
2:26 - Metrics
3:08 - KPIs
4:16 - OKRs
6:12 - The Cross-Domain Trick
9:04 - How to Implement

Video URL: https://youtu.be/9BwpcO-0LuI
fulltitle: Understand Business Metrics for Data Analysts (Most Get This Wrong)
